threshold: Zero missing or extra columns
Zero type mismatches on numeric and date fields
Zero nulls on all key columns
Source count equals landing count
Latest record within SLA window (set threshold)
No date field value more than N days after load date (set N)
All records fall within period_start to period_end
MoM volume change within threshold (set threshold)
MoM KPI change within threshold (set threshold)

test_name: Sudden Zero or Null in KPI
threshold: KPI non-null and non-zero when populated in prior period
No member exceeds X% of total when historically below Y% (set thresholds)
All dimension members active in prior N periods present in current period
Zero duplicate values on key column(s)
Zero orphan foreign keys; escalate to Tier 1 if orphans propagate to output
All derived fields match expected calculation within tolerance
Detail sum equals aggregate total within tolerance
Domain invariant holds on every row of final output (define invariant)
Paired values net to zero or expected constant within tolerance
All KPI columns within defined lower and upper bounds
Source total equals output total within tolerance (set tolerance)
All unit tests pass before deployment
Full synthetic dataset passes all Tier 1 checks end to end
Zero regressions on any prior passing test case
